# Get The Hay Out — Project Changelog
**Managed by Claude.** Do not edit manually.

| Build | File | Change |
|---|---|---|
| b20260408.0959 | HTML | Bulk survey UI overhaul (OI-0200). Sheet restructured to flex column with sticky bulk header (`#survey-bulk-header`) and scrollable body (`#survey-scroll-body`). Header has 4 rows: Cancel/Expand all/Close action buttons + DRAFT tag, survey date input, farm filter pills (if >1 farm), type filter pills (Pasture/Mixed-Use/All), search box. Cards collapsed by default — accordion behavior with `_bulkSurveyExpandedId` (one at a time) and `_bulkSurveyExpandAll` toggle. Collapsed card shows name, acreage, Active pill, current rating badge. Expanded card shows full form: rating slider, veg height, forage cover, forage condition buttons (Poor/Fair/Good/Excellent — NEW, field parity with single-pasture mode), recovery window. Snapshot-on-open (`_bulkSurveySnapshot`) enables Cancel restore: `confirm('Discard changes?')` → Yes restores snapshot + persists + closes, No just closes. Close button: `confirm('Save changes?')` → Yes commits via `completeBulkSurvey()`, No retains auto-saved draft. Bottom "Survey Complete" button removed from HTML. Auto-save triggers added to veg height, forage cover, forage condition, and recovery inputs (previously only rating slider triggered `_triggerSurveyDraftSave()`). New helper `_renderBulkConditionBtns()` updates condition button styles without full re-render. |
| b20260408.0029 | HTML | Move wizard hygiene (OI-0196–0199). Fix 1: arrival observation now written AFTER event push — prevents orphan observations on cancelled/failed moves. Fix 2: `closeMoveWizSheet` resets all wizard state (`_fcTypeData`, `_mwFeedDisposition`, all `_mw*` vars). `openMoveWizSheet` adds `_fcTypeData=[]` defense-in-depth. Fix 3: forage type "Set up this field" link no longer closes the wizard — pasture edit opens stacked (z-index:220) on top. Save refreshes forage preview; close removes stacked class. Fix 4: hard block on unverified feed check — when no prior real check exists (excludes `transfer_opening`), shows red warning "No prior check — verify current amount", disables Save button until user interacts with the feed check inputs. `userVerified` flag flips on any interaction, UI updates without full re-render. |
| b20260408.0009 | HTML | New `forage_condition` column in `paddock_observations` for text quality (Poor/Fair/Good/Excellent). Separates from `forage_quality` (0-100 numeric rating). Shape function, `_SB_ALLOWED_COLS` updated. Survey save/hydrate paths write `forageCondition` to new field. Move wizard arrival observation uses `forageCondition` for text quality. Draft save includes `forageQuality` key. CLAUDE.md: added "New UI Fields → Supabase Column Rule" and "Fix Root Causes, Not Symptoms" sections. |
| b20260407.2351 | HTML | Move Animals picker changed from group-based to event-based — shows open events (paddock + group names), taps "Move all" for that event. Single-pasture survey: added forage condition buttons (Poor/Fair/Good/Excellent) matching move wizard arrival survey. Move All button now shows on ALL events regardless of group count — both field home collapsed cards and detail home location cards. |
| b20260407.2312 | HTML | Field mode phases 5+7. Survey module split: `survey` renamed to `surveybulk`, new `surveysingle` (Pasture Survey) module added with picker sheet. `FIELD_MODULES_DEFAULT` updated. Migration in `_getUserFieldModules` maps legacy `survey` → `surveybulk`. Pasture Survey picker: farm/type/search filters, active paddocks sorted first, excludes crop-only. Heat picker: event/group filter pills added, field-mode full-screen treatment (backdrop, handle, close→home), `_hpFilterAnimals` filters by event then group. |
| b20260407.2243 | HTML | Fix: harvest field picker crash — `landUseBadge` is a local function inside `renderPastures()`, not global. Replaced with inline land use text. |
| b20260407.2238 | HTML | Fix: move wizard arrival paddock observation used wrong field names (`date` instead of `observedAt`, `type` instead of `source`). Caused `observed_at: null, source: null` in Supabase — NOT NULL violation, stuck queue entry. Changed to `observedAt: moveDate, source: 'event_open'`. |
| b20260407.2232 | HTML | Fix: harvest picker wouldn't launch — tractor emoji was rendered as unicode escape `\\ud83d\\ude9c` in template literal instead of actual emoji character. Reverted to crop + mixed-use field filter (not all fields). Added empty state message when no crop/mixed-use fields exist: "No crop or mixed-use fields set up. Edit a pasture and set its land use..." |
| b20260407.2219 | HTML | Fix: harvest field picker now shows ALL non-confinement pastures by default (was filtering to crop + mixed-use only, which excluded farms with only pasture-type fields). Type filter pills dynamically include Crop/Mixed-Use only when those land use types exist. |
| b20260407.2112 | HTML | Field mode UI refinement (phases 1-4). Icons swapped: Feed 🥩→🌾, Move 🚜→🐄, Harvest 🌾→🚜. Flash fix: Feed/Harvest/Survey skip `nav()` in field mode — sheet opens directly without rendering the underlying screen. New Move Animals picker: flat group list with paddock context, single-entry shortcut. New Feed Check picker: event list filtered to events with stored feed, shows group names. Harvest picker: farm filter pills (if >1 farm), Done button at top in field mode, return-to-picker after save instead of going home. |
| b20260407.1459 | HTML | Fix: broadened NOT NULL constraint drop in `_flushOneOp` to also match `null value in column` (exact Postgres error phrasing). Clears legacy orphan observations with null `observed_at`/`source`. |
| b20260407.1424 | HTML | Fix: Supabase SDK not loading on mobile. jsdelivr updated the file at `@2` URL, breaking the SRI integrity hash. Browser silently blocked the script. Pinned to `@2.102.0` (specific version) and removed SRI hash. |
| b20260407.1320 | HTML | Fix: sign-in not available on mobile after initial load. Auth overlay was `remove()`'d from DOM on load for signed-in users — once removed, tapping avatar with no session did nothing. Changed to `display:none` (hide, not remove). `openSignOutSheet` now re-shows the overlay when `_sbSession` is null. `_dismissAuthOverlay` also changed to hide instead of remove. |
| b20260407.0145 | HTML | Event edit dialog: `renderEeAudSummary` now shows "Estimated Summary" for open events (head, weight, AU, capacity AUDs, days remaining, DM breakdown) instead of actual AU/AUD consumption data. Closed events keep the existing "AU / AUD Summary" with actual totals. |
| b20260407.0139 | HTML | Fix: weight/AU line was overwritten by capacity estimate block. Both `line2` assignments (capacity available + nudge fallback) now prepend `_weightLine` instead of replacing it. |
| b20260407.0126 | HTML | Location card: added "Weight: X lbs · Y AU" line for open events above the capacity estimate. Removed AU from the Day/In/Cost line to avoid duplication. Event edit dialog (`updateEventEditPreview`) now shows the estimated capacity summary for open events (weight, AU, capacity AUDs, days remaining, DM breakdown) instead of hiding the preview. Closed events continue showing actual totals. `estimateDaysRemaining` rounding fixed: values between 0.5-1.0 days now show 1 instead of 0. |
| b20260407.0107 | HTML | Flush lock: `flushToSupabase` now uses `_flushPromise` to prevent concurrent flush calls. If a flush is already running, callers await the existing promise instead of starting a second concurrent flush that could corrupt the queue. Extracted inner logic to `_flushToSupabaseInner()` with try/finally cleanup. |
| b20260407.0058 | HTML | Critical fix: removed bulk DELETE of event child records from `queueEventWrite`. The delete-all-then-reinsert pattern caused data loss: if DELETE succeeded but INSERTs failed (network blip), Supabase had events without children. Next `loadFromSupabase` loaded the empty event and overwrote local data — groups, feed entries, feed checks gone. Now uses upsert-only; orphan cleanup handled by "Push all to Supabase" (`_safePushAll`). Root cause of groups and feed entries disappearing from events. |
| b20260407.0048 | HTML | Fix: `estimateDaysRemaining` rewritten. Formula is now `(remainingPastureDM + storedFeedRemainingDM) / dailyDMI`. Previously used consumption-rate subtraction that undercounted stored feed. Returns audit data: `pastureDM`, `storedFeedDM`, `dailyDMI`. Location card shows DM breakdown line: "Pasture: X lbs DM · Stored feed: Y lbs DM · DMI demand: Z lbs/day". Works even when pasture estimate is unavailable (stored-feed-only events still get days remaining). |
| b20260407.0023 | HTML | Critical fix: `loadFromSupabase` now flushes pending local changes before loading. The 800ms debounce timer on `supabaseSyncDebounced` created a window where JWT refresh / app-wake SIGNED_IN events could trigger a load that overwrites localStorage with stale Supabase data. Root cause of feed entries, feed checks, and paddock observations disappearing after save. |
| b20260407.0023 | HTML | Location card nudge now differentiates: "Link a forage type" when no forage type set, vs "No forage estimate — pre-graze height needed · Set pre-graze data" when forage type exists but opening height is missing. Link opens event edit sheet. |
| b20260407.0023 | HTML | Critical fix: `flushToSupabase` race condition. Within each tier, DELETE operations now complete before INSERT/UPSERT operations. Previously both ran in parallel via `Promise.all`, so a DELETE WHERE event_id=X could wipe rows that were just INSERT'd for the same event. Root cause of feed entries disappearing after save. |
| b20260407.0023 | HTML | Fix: transfer entry IDs used `Date.now()*10` which exceeded `MAX_SAFE_INTEGER` when multiplied by 1000 in `queueEventWrite`. Changed to `Date.now() + i*2000` spacing (source) and `+ i*2000 + 1000` (dest) — stays within safe range and avoids assembly merge. |
| b20260407.0023 | HTML | `estimateDaysRemaining` now includes remaining stored feed in the calculation. Total available = pasture DM + remaining stored feed DM. Returns `{days, includesStoredFeed}`. Location card shows "(incl. stored feed)" annotation when stored feed contributes to the estimate. |
| b20260406.2340 | HTML | OI-0193: Active event AUD refinement. Open events now display "Est. capacity: X AUDs · ~X days remaining · height @ cover" instead of misleading consumption-to-date AUD number. Closed events keep their existing actual-derived display unchanged. New utility functions: `estimateAvailableDMForEvent(ev)`, `estimateAvailableAUDsForEvent(ev)`, `eventDailyDMIDemand(ev)`, `estimateDaysRemaining(ev)`. Move wizard step 3 gets live forage estimate preview after entering arrival height/cover. Pasture card view extended to active paddocks (shows "Est. opening" using event data). Event close snapshots `ev.totals.estimatedCapacityDM` and `ev.totals.estimatedCapacityAUDs` for future calibration. Graceful degradation: "No forage estimate · Link a forage type" nudge when forage type not linked. |
| b20260406.2340 | HTML | Auto-uncheck "100% stored feed" when a grazing sub-move is added to a stored-feed event. `saveSubMove()` clears `ev.noPasture` if the sub-move is not noPasture, shows toast notification. Prevents events from staying flagged as stored-feed-only when sub-moves prove pasture is being used. |
| b20260406.2340 | HTML | Feed checks in event edit now sorted chronologically (most recent at top). `renderEeFeedChecks` sorts by date descending before rendering. |
| b20260406.2340 | HTML | Multi-group AUD calculation: `_memberWeightedDays` now handles multi-group events using group-level `headSnapshot × daysPresent` (clamped to event window via `dateJoined`/`dateRemoved`). Returns time-weighted average weight across groups. Both NPK call sites (`calcEventTotalsWithSubMoves`, `recalcEventTotals`) updated to use `effectiveWt`. Previously multi-group events returned null and fell back to `head × days` — but `head` was null on closed events where all groups had `dateRemoved` set. |
| b20260406.2340 | HTML | Fix: closed event paddock status. `renderEeActivePaddocks` now shows "Closed" instead of hardcoded "Active" when event status is closed. `renderEePaddockChips` checks event status when determining paddock close state (previously only checked `dateRemoved`). |
| b20260406.2340 | HTML | Fix: `assembleEvents` head/wt backfill now uses ALL groups for closed events (not just active ones). Closed events had all groups with `dateRemoved` set, causing activeGroups to be empty and head/wt to stay null. |
| b20260406.2340 | HTML | OI-0189 closed: harvest active checkbox was invisible due to `.field input` CSS setting `-webkit-appearance:none`. Fixed with explicit `appearance:checkbox` + `accent-color:var(--green)`. |
| b20260406.2340 | HTML | Fix: sync queue `_flushOneOp` now drops entries that fail with NOT NULL constraint violations instead of retrying forever. Clears orphan paddock_observations with null pasture_id. |
| b20260406.2340 | HTML | Fix: sub-move `pastureId` root cause. `saveSubMove()` now stores `pastureId` at creation time. `migrateSystemIds()` backfills existing sub-moves by looking up `locationName`. `_writePaddockObservation` guards against null pastureId. Removed duplicate `_sbFetch('farms')` from `loadFromSupabase` that was misaligning Promise.all destructuring (pre-existing bug — farms from Supabase were silently discarded). |
| b20260406.2340 | HTML | OI-0191: Feed transfer ledger model. New `createFeedTransfer()` double-entry helper creates paired negative/positive feed entries with shared `transferPairId` and `kind:'transfer'`. Rewrote `_mwSave` transfer block to use helper (fixes batchId silent drop bug). `getDailyStoredDMI` now includes negative deliveries and splits pos/neg in segment math. `openFeedCheckSheet` `totalUnits` excludes negatives via `Math.max(0, qty)`. Transfer entries render with arrow styling (← incoming / → outgoing) in event edit feed list. Delete protection for transfer pairs — warns user and removes both sides. `event_feed_deliveries` Supabase table: added `kind`, `transfer_pair_id`, `notes` columns. `_SB_ALLOWED_COLS` explicit entry added. `assembleEvents` preserves `kind`, `transferPairId`, `notes` on feed entry reconstruction. |
| b20260406.2340 | HTML | Cleanup: removed `console.log` from `toggleFeedTypeHarvestActive` (OI-0189 investigation complete — was CSS issue, not logic). |
| b20260406.2340 | HTML | Fix: `loadFromSupabase` duplicate `_sbFetch('farms')` removed — was misaligning destructuring, causing `farmRes.data` to be undefined (farms loaded from Supabase were silently discarded). Sub-move `pastureId` now stored at creation time + backfilled in `migrateSystemIds`. Sync queue auto-drops NOT NULL constraint failures. Paddock observation guard skips null `pastureId`. |
| b20260406.2340 | HTML | OI-0187: Batch nutritional profiles. New `S.batchNutritionalProfiles[]` collection + `batch_nutritional_profiles` Supabase table. Shape function, `_SB_ALLOWED_COLS`, FLUSH_TIERS (tier 4), `ensureDataArrays`, `loadFromSupabase`, `pushAllToSupabase` all updated. `latestBatchProfile(batchId)` helper returns most recent profile by date. Auto-seeds default profile on batch creation (`addBatch()` + `saveHarvestEvent()` harvest auto-creation) from feed type NPK. Feed residual NPK credit in `wizCloseEvent()` now reads batch profile → feed type fallback instead of hardcoded zeros. Feed test entry UI in batch edit sheet with source badges, inline form, extended analysis disclosure, profile history. |
| b20260406.2340 | HTML | OI-0188: Feed type sheet UX. Layout flipped — existing types list moved to top, add/edit form below. Harvest active toggle pill label changed to "Harvest: Active" / "Harvest: Inactive". Cancel button added to create mode (calls `_clearFeedTypeForm()`). Done button moved to standalone position at bottom of sheet. |
| b20260406.2340 | HTML | OI-0189: Harvest active toggle bug investigation. Added `console.log` tracing to `toggleFeedTypeHarvestActive()` for DevTools reproduction. Code path (`stampSetup` + `queueWrite` + `save` + `renderFeedTypes`) appears correct — needs hands-on mobile testing. |
| b20260406.2340 | HTML | OI-0190: Field mode harvest field picker. Added field picker step as first screen when opening harvest from field mode. Filters to crop + mixed-use pastures with filter pills (All/Crop/Mixed-Use) and search. After picking a field, advances to tile grid with field pre-selected on first row of each tile. Uses `sortedPastures()` + `landUseBadge()` existing helpers. |
| b20260406.2340 | HTML | Events screen: added AU/AUD/DM summary (Pasture AUDs, stored + pasture DM lbs) to every event row. Sort changed from array-reverse to dateIn descending (most recent first). Removed "Total presence" AUDs from event edit summary — only Pasture AUDs shown. |
| b20260406.2340 | HTML | AUD calculation now subtracts stored feed DM before computing pasture AUDs (pastureDM / dmPerAUD setting). All displays updated: event edit summary shows "Pasture AUDs" (from pasture DM only) + "Total presence" (all animal-days). Location cards, group cards, event history all show Pasture AUDs. Sub-moves in event edit show per-move DM split. |: event edit summary (anchor + per-submove), location cards, group cards, event history. |
| b20260406.2340 | HTML | AU/AUD audit info: Event edit card shows AU/AUD summary (total head, live weight, AU, days, AUDs + per-paddock/sub-move breakdown). Group chips show total weight and AU count. Location cards show AU and AUDs in header. Event history shows AU/AUD per closed event. |
| b20260406.2340 | HTML | OI-0186: AUD & forage estimation system. (A) Shape functions + _SB_ALLOWED_COLS updated for forage_types (dm_lbs_per_inch_per_acre, min_residual_height), pastures (forage_type_id, residual_graze_height), operations (residual_graze_height, forage_utilization_pct, dm_per_aud). (B) migrateForageTypesV2 backfills DM/in/ac + residual on seeded types. (C) 6 new calc functions: getEffectiveResidual, getLatestVegObservation, estimateAvailableDM, estimateAvailableAUDs, estimateGrazeDays, stockingEfficiency. (D) Forage type sheet: 2 new fields. (E) Pasture edit: forage type selector + residual override. (F) Settings: grazing management card (DM/AUD, residual, utilization). (G) Paddock card shows estimated DM/AUDs on idle paddocks. (H) Rotation calendar: efficiency % metric. (I) Move wizard: estimated grazing days on destination paddocks. |
| b20260406.2340 | HTML | "Push all to Supabase" button now calls `_safePushAll()` which loads latest from Supabase before pushing, preventing overwrite of changes made on other devices. Shows progress status. |
| b20260406.2340 | HTML | Supabase sync audit: fixed 7 remaining gaps where mutations called `save()` without `queueWrite()`. (1) `applySpreadSheet` manure amendment event. (2-3) `saveSplit` health events for source/dest groups + new event. (4-5) `saveApplyInput` parent application record + per-paddock amendment events. (6) `logGroupChange` health events. (7) `_mwSave` arrival paddock observation. All now queue to Supabase before `save()`. |
| b20260406.2340 | HTML | Bug fix: `saveCalving()` never queued the calf, dam update, weight record, or calving health event to Supabase. Calf and calving data were saved to localStorage only, never synced. Added `queueWrite` calls for: new calf animal, dam update, birth weight record, calving health event on dam. |
| b20260406.2340 | HTML | Fix: `saveSettings()` had a second `queueWrite('operations', ...)` that was missed in the earlier operations-to-direct-UPDATE fix. Caused perpetual RLS error in sync queue. Changed to direct UPDATE matching `pushAllToSupabase()` pattern. |
| b20260406.2340 | HTML | Feature: Field module preferences now sync via Supabase `operation_members.field_modules` (jsonb). `_setUserFieldModules()` writes to both localStorage cache and Supabase. `sbCacheIdentity()` and `getActiveUser()` prefer `_sbProfile.fieldModules` from Supabase over local cache. Persists across devices and survives sign-out. |
| b20260406.2340 | supabase/ | Migration: `field_modules jsonb` column added to `operation_members`. |
| b20260406.2340 | HTML | Fix: Heat events excluded from general "Treatment history" list on animal edit card (shown in separate "Heat history" section). Added "Treatment history" header to health events section. Delete heat record: fixed ID comparison to use String() for robust matching. |
| b20260406.2340 | HTML | OI-0185 Task 1: `animal_health_events` Supabase write path wired. Created `_animalHealthEventRow()` shape function mapping all 24 columns. Added `_SB_ALLOWED_COLS` entry. `saveAnimalEvent()` now calls `queueWrite`. `deleteAnimalEvent()` now queues Supabase delete. `pushAllToSupabase()` iterates all animal health events. All health event types (note, treatment, breeding, heat, bcs) now sync to Supabase. |
| b20260406.2340 | HTML | OI-0185 Task 2: Heat history section in animal edit card. Shows below confirmed bred section for female animals. Lists all heat events newest first with date, time, notes, Edit button. "Record heat" button opens dedicated heat sheet. |
| b20260406.2340 | HTML | OI-0185 Task 3: Heat record sheet (`#heat-record-wrap`). Standalone sheet for recording/editing heat events. Date, time, notes fields. Edit mode shows delete button. Toast confirmation on save. |
| b20260406.2340 | HTML | OI-0185 Task 4: Heat badge on animal list. Female animals with heat recorded within 3 days show pink "🌡 Heat" badge inline with other badges. |
| b20260406.2340 | HTML | OI-0185 Task 5: Field mode "Record Heat" module with animal picker (`#heat-picker-wrap`). Two-step flow: searchable female animal list → date/time/notes → save → back to picker for next animal. Added to FIELD_MODULES (opt-in, not in defaults). |
| b20260406.2340 | supabase/ | Migration: `time text` column added to `animal_health_events`. |
| b20260405.NEXT | HTML | Feature: Animal classes can now be edited via Edit button in manage classes sheet. `editAnimalClass()` populates form, button changes to "Save changes", Cancel button shown. Fixed "undefined lbs" and "undefined% DMI" display — shows dash when fields are null. |
| b20260405.NEXT | HTML | OI-0183 Fix 1: `getDailyStoredDMI()` anchor conversion rewritten to use `typeChecks` array (unit-based remaining lbs) instead of percentage of cumulative DM. New helper `_fcCheckToRemainingLbs()` looks up batch wt/dm per feed type. Falls back to pct-based for legacy checks without typeChecks. |
| b20260405.NEXT | HTML | OI-0183 Fix 4: No-check pasture events return `{noSplit: true}` instead of broken `totalDM/days` estimate. `_renderDMIBars` shows gray bars at full DMI height with "Feed check needed" message. Confinement/noPasture events keep existing 100% stored behavior. |
| b20260405.NEXT | HTML | OI-0183 Fix 2: Move wizard transfer now creates synthetic opening feed check on destination event with `notes:'transfer_opening'`, `typeChecks` for transferred types, and `carriedRate` from source event. Source rate captured via `getDailyStoredDMI(srcEv, moveDate)` before source is closed. |
| b20260405.NEXT | HTML | OI-0183 Fix 3: `getDailyStoredDMI()` detects synthetic transfer checks (`notes==='transfer_opening'`) and returns `carriedRate` as stored DMI until first real check exists. |
| b20260405.NEXT | supabase/ | Migration: `carried_rate` numeric column added to `event_feed_residual_checks`. |
| b20260405.NEXT | HTML | OI-0184 Fix 7: Feed check percent field multi-digit typing. Added `skipPct` parameter to `_fcUpdateUI()`. `_fcPctChanged()` passes `skipPct=true` so the percent field isn't rewritten while user types. |
| b20260405.NEXT | HTML | OI-0184 Fix 6: Feed check stepper increment changed from 0.25 to 0.10. Native number input spinners hidden via CSS (`-webkit-appearance:none` on all number inputs). |
| b20260405.NEXT | HTML | OI-0184 Fix 5: Feed check max cap at `lastCheckUnits` instead of `startedUnits`. Applied to `_fcAdj`, `_fcUnitsChanged`, `_fcPctChanged`, `_fcSliderChanged`, HTML `max` attributes on units input and slider. Prevents increasing remaining above last check value. |
| b20260405.NEXT | HTML | Bug fix: `aoSaveAccount()` rewritten to fire-and-forget both `updateUser({password})` and `operation_members` display_name update. `updateUser` triggers `onAuthStateChange(SIGNED_IN)` which deadlocks with the load chain when awaited — the SDK waits for the auth listener to finish, but the listener is blocked by `_sbLoadInProgress`. Overlay now dismisses immediately; password and name save in background. to prevent infinite hang. Shows "timed out — try again" error instead of stuck "Saving…" button. |
| b20260405.NEXT | HTML | Bug fix: Auth overlay Step 3 race condition — `verifyOtp()` triggers `onAuthStateChange(SIGNED_IN)` which runs the load chain and calls `_dismissAuthOverlay()` before Step 3 is shown. Added `_aoStep3Pending` flag set before `verifyOtp`, checked in `_dismissAuthOverlay()` to block premature dismissal. Cleared on save/skip. |
| b20260405.NEXT | HTML | (Superseded) Auth overlay Step 3 — previous fix checked step3 visibility but was insufficient because dismiss fired before step3 was made visible. Replaced by `_aoStep3Pending` flag approach. SIGNED_IN handler calling `_dismissAuthOverlay()` after load chain completed. `_dismissAuthOverlay()` now checks if Step 3 is visible and returns early if so. |
| b20260405.NEXT | HTML | Bug fix: `sbGetOperationId()` used `.maybeSingle()` which errors when user belongs to multiple operations. Changed to: if cached operation ID exists, fetch that specific row; otherwise fetch all rows and prefer owner role. Fixes `_sbProfile` not being set → `isAdmin()` returning false → invite button hidden for multi-operation users. |
| b20260405.NEXT | HTML | Bug fix: `sbBootstrapOperation()` now checks if user already owns an operation before creating a new one. Prevents duplicate operations on repeated sign-ins when `get_my_operation_id()` returns a different operation (e.g. user is member of another farm). |
| b20260405.NEXT | HTML | Bug fix: `saveSoilTest()` generated numeric string IDs (`Date.now()`) but Supabase `soil_tests.id` column is `uuid` type. Changed to use `crypto.randomUUID()` with fallback. Existing numeric IDs in queue will still fail — those soil tests need re-entry. |
| b20260405.NEXT | HTML | Bug fix: Event edit dialog hid the Feed Checks section when no checks existed yet. Condition changed from `noPasture || hasFeedChecks` to also include `hasStoredFeed` (event has feed entries). Section now shows with "No checks recorded yet" message and Add button. |
| b20260405.NEXT | HTML | Bug fix: Feed check edit from event editor created a duplicate instead of updating the existing record. `_fcSave()` always pushed a new entry. Added `_fcEditId` state variable; `editEeFeedCheck()` now sets it before opening the sheet; `_fcSave()` updates the existing record when `_fcEditId` is set. Also restores per-type remaining values when editing. |
| b20260405.NEXT | HTML | Fix: `pushAllToSupabase()` operations row changed from upsert to direct UPDATE. Upsert attempted INSERT which failed RLS `owner_id = auth.uid()` check during backup restore. Operations row is identity — should only be updated, never inserted by restore. Added `submissions` and `animal_health_events` to `FLUSH_TIERS`. |
| b20260405.NEXT | HTML | OI-0175: Tiered flush ordering in `flushToSupabase()`. Queue items grouped by table and flushed in 5 FK dependency tiers (Tier 0=roots → Tier 4=leaves). Fast path for single-item queues. Extracted `_flushOneOp()` helper. Added `FLUSH_TIERS` constant + `_FLUSH_TIER_MAP`. |
| b20260405.NEXT | HTML | OI-0176/0182: Created `_inputApplicationRow()` shape function. Maps JS fields to correct Supabase columns (`nLbsTotal→n_lbs_total`, `totalCost→total_cost`, etc.). Strips nested `locations[]`. Added `_SB_ALLOWED_COLS` entry for `input_applications`. |
| b20260405.NEXT | HTML | OI-0177: Added `_SB_ALLOWED_COLS` entry for `operations` that excludes `operation_id` (the table uses `id` as PK). Expanded `pushAllToSupabase()` operations write to include all herd fields. |
| b20260405.NEXT | HTML | OI-0178: Added `deleteOperationData(opId)` — deletes all operation data in reverse tier order (Tier 4→1, skip Tier 0 identity). Updated `importDataJSON()` to call delete before upsert. Progress: "Clearing cloud data…" → "Restoring to cloud…" → "✓ Restored & synced." |
| b20260405.NEXT | HTML | OI-0179: Added `manure_batches` to `pushAllToSupabase()` — parent table was missing, only transactions were written. |
| b20260405.NEXT | HTML | OI-0180/0181: Created `_manureBatchRow()` shape function. Maps JS model fields to new Supabase columns. Strips nested `events[]`. Added `_SB_ALLOWED_COLS` entry. |
| b20260405.NEXT | HTML | Added `operation_id` to `_harvestEventFieldRow()` shape function and `_SB_ALLOWED_COLS` entry. Updated both call sites. |
| b20260405.NEXT | supabase/ | Migration `20260405_backup_restore_fixes.sql`: Added columns to `manure_batches` (name, label, location_name, mode, n_lbs, p_lbs, k_lbs, estimated_volume_lbs, remaining_lbs, created_at). Added `operation_id` to `harvest_event_fields` with backfill from parent. |
| b20260405.1206 | CLAUDE.md | Added "Data Integrity — Backup/Restore Congruence" section with trigger table for changes that require backup/restore review (new S.* fields, renamed keys, new Supabase tables, changed row shapes, new migrations). |
| b20260405.1206 | CLAUDE.md | Added "Deploy Gate" checklist — PROJECT_CHANGELOG, ARCHITECTURE.md, OPEN_ITEMS, and syntax check must all be completed before running deploy.py. |
| b20260405.1206 | ARCHITECTURE.md | Documented bootstrap dedup guard (`_sbBootstrapPromise`) and `_sbProfile` set during bootstrap. |
| b20260405.1206 | PROJECT_CHANGELOG.md | Backfilled all session changes from b20260405.1113 and b20260405.1137. |
| b20260405.1206 | SESSION_RULES.md | Fixed §7a inconsistency — changed from "update OPEN_ITEMS.md and deliver it" to "capture in SESSION_BRIEF per §4d". |
| b20260405.1137 | HTML | Bug fix: `sbBootstrapOperation()` now sets `_sbProfile` with role `'owner'` after creating the member row. Previously `_sbProfile` was null after bootstrap, so `isAdmin()` returned `false` for new operation owners until next page load. |
| b20260405.1113 | HTML | Bug fix: Replaced boolean `_sbBootstrapInProgress` guard with promise-based `_sbBootstrapPromise` dedup. Both `sbPostSignInCheck()` and `onAuthStateChange` → `sbGetOperationId()` fire concurrently after OTP verification — boolean flag was insufficient because both async paths passed the check before either awaited the insert, creating duplicate operations. Second caller now awaits the first caller's promise. |
| b20260405.1113 | CLAUDE.md | Added "Deploy prompt" rule under Branching & Deploy — Claude Code should ask user if they want to deploy after completing a fix or feature. |
| b20260405.1113 | supabase/ | Added `supabase/migrations/20260405_rls_new_user_signup.sql` — RLS policies for new-user signup flow (operations INSERT/SELECT/UPDATE, operation_members INSERT/SELECT/UPDATE/DELETE, `claim_pending_invite` RPC). |
| b20260405.0134 | HTML | Bug fix: Home screen desktop 2-column grid — view toggle (`renderHomeViewToggle`) and unplaced groups section now span both columns via `grid-column:1/-1`. Previously toggle occupied one grid cell while the first location card occupied the other, creating large dead space in the left column. |
| b20260405.0134 | HTML | Bug fix: Events screen active rotation banner (`renderEventsLog`) now shows ALL active events, not just the first one. Changed from `getActive()` (returns single event via `.find()`) to `getActiveEvents()` (returns array via `.filter()`). Each active event renders its own banner with paddock chips, group names, and day count. Also fixed group display to use `evGroups(ae)` instead of legacy `ae.groupId` field. |
| b20260405.0134 | HTML | Rework: Move wizard step 3 (`_mwRenderStep3`) redesigned — FROM section (red accent bar) now renders on top with pasture close-out survey embedded; TO section (green accent bar) renders on bottom with arrival survey embedded. Replaced old side-by-side FROM→TO card layout. Close-out survey simplified: forage quality and forage cover % fields removed (pre-graze readings, not appropriate for post-graze close-out). Retained: residual height, recovery min/max, est. return. TO section shows arrival survey (forage height, cover, condition) for new pasture destinations, or a simple header for existing/confinement destinations. |
| b20260405.0100 | HTML | Bug fix: `sbPostSignInCheck()` now bootstraps new users directly when no `operation_members` row is found AND no cached `_sbOperationId` exists. Previously relied on concurrent `onAuthStateChange` → `sbGetOperationId()` path which could race and fail to bootstrap. New users signing in via OTP would land in the app with no operation. Also added `await` to `loadFromSupabase()` call in the member-found path for consistent sequencing. |
| b20260405.0100 | HTML | UX: Auth overlay default flipped to password mode. Password field visible by default, button says "Sign in". Toggle link reads "First time? Use email code instead" (was "Sign in with password instead"). `_aoPasswordMode` starts `true`. `aoTogglePassword()` labels updated. Email Enter key focuses password field in default mode. |
| b20260405.0100 | HTML | Feature: Auth overlay Step 3 — "Set up your account" shown after OTP verification. Fields: Your name, Password, Confirm password. `aoSaveAccount()` calls `_sbClient.auth.updateUser({password})` to set password + updates `operation_members.display_name` + refreshes identity cache. `aoSkipSetup()` dismisses overlay without setting password. `aoVerifyOtp()` now advances to step 3 instead of dismissing immediately. Step 3 pre-fills name from cached identity if available. |
| b20260404.1336 | HTML | Feature (OI-0171 Phase 1): Auth overlay — full-screen branded `#auth-overlay` shown when `_sbSession` is null on app load. Two-step email→OTP form (`aoSignIn`, `aoSendCode`, `aoVerifyOtp`, `aoSignInWithPassword`, `aoTogglePassword`, `aoBackToStep1`). Password toggle option. Overlay removed from DOM on successful auth via `_dismissAuthOverlay()`. Synchronous `sb-*-auth-token` localStorage check in inline `<script>` prevents flash for signed-in users. `_renderAuthOverlay()` re-creates overlay DOM for sign-out path. |
| b20260404.1336 | HTML | Feature (OI-0171 Phase 1): Sign-out confirmation sheet — `#signout-sheet-wrap` bottom sheet with avatar, email, descriptive text, red "Sign out" button, Cancel. `openSignOutSheet()` / `closeSignOutSheet()`. Header avatar `#hdr-avatar` onclick rewired from `openUserPicker()` to `openSignOutSheet()`. |
| b20260404.1336 | HTML | Feature (OI-0171 Phase 1): `sbSignOut()` now calls `_renderAuthOverlay()` after sign-out. `onAuthStateChange` handler calls `_dismissAuthOverlay()` after successful load chain (covers password sign-in path). |
| b20260404.1336 | HTML | Cleanup (OI-0171 Phase 1): Settings "Account & sync" card simplified — removed step-1/step-2 sign-in UI and sign-out button. Retained: connected banner with email, display name input with save, sync queue inspector card, operation members card. Old Settings auth functions (`sbSignInStep1`, `sbSignInWithPassword`, `sbSendCode`, `sbVerifyOtp`, `sbResetToStep1`, `_sbStep1Status`, `_sbStep2Status`) retained as dead code (safely guarded, no UI triggers them). |
| b20260404.1336 | HTML | CSS: Auth overlay styles added — `#auth-overlay` full-screen fixed positioning z-index:500, green gradient background, `.ao-card` white card, `.ao-btn` / `.ao-btn-outline` / `.ao-field` / `.ao-status` / `.ao-pw-toggle` form styles. Dark mode support for card and toggle. |
| b20260404.1336 | SESSION_RULES | §4d: SESSION_BRIEF filename convention changed from `SESSION_BRIEF_bYYYYMMDD_HHMM.md` to `SESSION_BRIEF_[subject-slug].md`. Doc version bumped to v17. |
| b20260403.1749 | HTML | Feature (Brief Item 2): Move wizard step 3 now shows "ARRIVAL PASTURE SURVEY" section when creating a new event at a pasture destination. Fields: forage height (in), forage cover (%), forage condition (Poor/Fair/Good/Exc buttons). Data written to new event's `heightIn`, `forageCoverIn`, `qualityIn` + paddock observation with `type:'open'`. New module var `_mwArrQuality`, handler `_mwArrSetQuality()`. Only shows for `_mwDestType==='new'` + non-confinement. |
| b20260403.1749 | HTML | Feature (Brief Item 4): Event edit active paddock cards now show compact read-only starting survey data (`📏 7.5 in · 65% cover · Good`). Anchor paddock reads from `ev.heightIn`/`forageCoverIn`/`qualityIn`. Non-anchor paddocks look up `S.paddockObservations` by pastureId + sourceId + type='open'. Sub-move cards show `sm.heightIn`/`forageCoverIn`/`qualityIn`. Only renders when at least one value exists. |
| b20260403.1749 | HTML | Rework (Brief Items 1+3): `getDailyStoredDMI()` fully rewritten with cumulative delivery timeline. Old: summed all deliveries into single `totalDMLbs`, used %-based interpolation — broke on mid-event deliveries (inflated total) and same-% consecutive checks (returned 0). New: builds per-delivery timeline with dates, `cumDMAt(date)` for cumulative DM at any point, converts check % to actual remaining lbs relative to cumulative at check time, computes per-segment consumption accounting for mid-segment deliveries. Same-% fallback: when segment rate is 0 but overall consumption exists, uses overall average rate. |
| b20260403.1729 | HTML | Feature (#5): Edit sub-move sheet now shows forage cover in/out and forage condition (with pre-selected button state). Quality + cover saved in `saveEditSubMove()`. |
| b20260403.1729 | HTML | Feature (#6): Feed check percentage field is now a direct-entry input (in addition to slider). `_fcPctChanged()` handler converts % → remaining units. Bidirectional: typing %, adjusting slider, or changing units all stay in sync. |
| b20260403.1729 | HTML | Bug fix (#10): Sub-moves auto-close when anchor event closes. Both `_mwSave` (move wizard) and `saveEventEdit` (last-group-out rule) now iterate active sub-moves and set `dateOut`/`durationHours`. Prevents orphan active sub-moves on closed events. |
| b20260403.1729 | HTML | Feature (#11): "+ Add sub-move" link now always visible on home event cards, even when no sub-moves exist yet. Previously the entire SUB-PADDOCKS section was hidden when empty. |
| b20260403.1729 | HTML | Feature (#3): Home card sub-paddock list now sorted: active sub-moves first, then closed in reverse chronological order (most recent first). |
| b20260403.1729 | HTML | Cleanup (#12): Legacy paddock dropdown in event edit form hidden (`display:none`). Paddock management uses the active paddock cards and chips sections. |
| b20260403.1642 | HTML | Bug fix: "Open new sub-paddock? → Yes" now launches `openSubMoveWiz` (paddock picker wizard) instead of legacy `openSubMoveSheet`. Close date/time from the just-closed sub-paddock pre-fills into the wizard confirm step via `_mwSubMovePreDate`/`_mwSubMovePreTime`. |
| b20260403.1642 | HTML | Feature: New edit sub-move sheet (`#edit-sm-wrap`, z-index:210) — full-width overlay with location info card, date/time in/out, pasture survey section (height, recovery, hidden for confinement), notes, Save/Cancel buttons. `openEditSubMoveSheet(evId, smId)` renders the form; `saveEditSubMove()` auto-calculates duration from dates, updates pasture recovery days, queues event write, refreshes home + event edit if open. Replaces legacy `openSmEditForm` for all Edit buttons. |
| b20260403.1642 | HTML | Rewire: All sub-move "Edit" buttons (event edit sub-move list + legacy manage sheet) now call `openEditSubMoveSheet` instead of `openSubMoveSheetFromEdit`/`openSmEditForm`. |
| b20260403.1609 | HTML | Feature: Feed check button added to home screen event cards (non-compact). Shows "Feed check" (amber, launches dialog) when stored feed exists, or grayed "Feed check" with alert "No stored feed in this event" when no feed. Feed button moved to the right. Compact (field mode) layout unchanged. |
| b20260403.1609 | HTML | Bug fix: Feed check edit from event edit now preserves the original check's date/time. `editEeFeedCheck()` captures the check's date/time before opening the dialog and pre-fills the date/time inputs after render via setTimeout. Previously always defaulted to today/now. |
| b20260403.1609 | HTML | Bug fix: DMI bars not rendering for events — `cls.dmiPct` is null when loaded from Supabase (`animal_classes` table has no `dmi_pct` column). `getGroupTotals()` calculated `(null)/100 = 0` → `dmiTarget=0` → `_renderDMIBars` returned empty. Fix: null-safe fallback `((cls&&cls.dmiPct!=null)?cls.dmiPct:2.5)/100` applied to all 3 dmiPct calculation sites (individual animals path, class-based path, renderEeGroupChips). All events now show DMI bars. |
| b20260403.1552 | HTML | Bug fix: Supabase delete propagation for ALL 13 local delete operations. Previously, locally-deleted records persisted in Supabase and reappeared on next load. Each now queues a `_delete:` entry before the local splice/filter. Affected: `deleteEvent` (parent + 6 child tables), `deleteAnimal`, `deleteAnimalFromScreen`, `tryDeletePasture`, `tryDeleteFeedType`, `tryDeleteAnimalClass`, `tryDeleteAnimalGroup`, `tryDeleteInputProduct`, `tryDeleteBatch`, `deleteSubMove`, `deleteEeFeedCheck`, forage types splice, farms splice. Systemic audit complete — all delete paths now covered. |
| b20260403.1548 | HTML | Bug fix: `_SB_COL_ALIASES` added — sanitizer now RENAMES wrong column names instead of stripping them. `location_type` → `type`, `recovery_min_days` → `min_days`, `recovery_max_days` → `max_days` for pastures. Stuck queue entries with old column names will now write correctly instead of losing the pasture type data. |
| b20260403.1544 | HTML | Bug fix: Delete-before-write extended to ALL 6 child tables (`event_paddock_windows`, `event_group_memberships`, `event_sub_moves`, `event_feed_deliveries`, `event_feed_residual_checks`, `event_npk_deposits`). Orphan rows from locally-deleted sub-moves, paddock windows, group memberships, and NPK deposits will now be cleaned up on next event save. Delete entries placed BEFORE all child upserts in the queue so the sequence is: parent upsert → 6 deletes → all child upserts. |
| b20260403.1544 | HTML | Bug fix: `pastures` added to `_SB_ALLOWED_COLS` with correct column names (`type` not `location_type`, `min_days`/`max_days` not `recovery_min_days`). Prevents "Could not find the 'location_type' column" Supabase error. Old queue entries with `location_type` will be stripped by the sanitizer. |
| b20260403.1537 | HTML | Bug fix: Feed entry duplication root cause — `flushToSupabase` now handles `_delete:` table prefix. When the queue encounters `{table:'_delete:event_feed_deliveries', record:{event_id:X}}`, it runs `DELETE ... WHERE event_id=X` before the subsequent upserts recreate current rows. This eliminates orphan delivery rows that accumulated when feed entries were deleted locally (the upsert-only queue had no delete mechanism). Applied to both `event_feed_deliveries` and `event_feed_residual_checks`. |
| b20260403.1537 | HTML | Bug fix: `bumpSetupUpdatedAt` no longer queues ALL 34 pastures for write on every call. Previously flooded the sync queue with redundant pasture upserts. Now just updates `setupUpdatedAt` timestamps and calls `save()`. |
| b20260403.1523 | HTML | Feature: Sub-move wizard mode — `openSubMoveWiz(evId)` sets `_mwSubMoveMode=true`, `_mwDestType='new'`, skips step 1, goes straight to paddock picker (step 2a). Back from step 2 closes wizard. Step 3 dispatches to `_mwRenderSubMoveConfirm()` — simplified confirm with FROM/TO cards, date/time, notes, teal info box explaining temporary move. Paddock picker is the same one used by full moves. |
| b20260403.1523 | HTML | Feature: `_mwSaveSubMove()` — creates sub-move record on source event (id, locationName, pastureId, date, time, notes, recovery defaults from pasture). Also adds paddock window for NPK tracking if not already present. Queues event write and renders home. |
| b20260403.1523 | HTML | Rewire: Home card "+ Add sub-move" and event edit "+ Add sub-move" both now call `openSubMoveWiz(evId)` instead of the legacy `openSubMoveSheet`. The legacy dialog (too narrow, no visible save buttons on mobile) is no longer reachable from add flows. Edit sub-move still uses `openSubMoveSheetFromEdit` for existing sub-moves. |
| b20260403.1200 | HTML | Feature: Event edit sub-move section overhauled — removed "Manage" button. Section header simplified to "Sub-moves". `renderEeSubMoves` rewritten: always shows section (even when empty), active sub-moves have "Close" button using `openCloseSubPaddockSheet`, all sub-moves have "Edit" button. Duration shows rounded hours. "+ Add sub-move" link at bottom opens sub-move sheet in add-only mode. |
| b20260403.1200 | HTML | Feature: `openSubMoveSheet(eventId, addOnly)` — new `addOnly` parameter hides the existing sub-moves list (`#sm-existing-wrap`) when opening for creation only. Used by home card "+ Add sub-move" and event edit "+ Add sub-move". |
| b20260403.1200 | HTML | Feature: `openAddSubMoveFromEdit()` — closes event edit, then opens sub-move sheet in add-only mode. Called from the "+ Add sub-move" link in the event edit sub-move section. |
| b20260403.1153 | HTML | Feature: Feed check "consumed since last check" bar now updates live when user adjusts remaining units. `_fcUpdateUI()` recalculates consumed units and DMI and updates `#fc-consumed-{idx}` element. Previously the bar was static from initial render. |
| b20260403.1153 | HTML | Feature: Feed check edit/add from event edit form now launches the full standalone feed check dialog (`openFeedCheckSheet`) instead of the old inline slider form. `_fcOnCloseCallback` fires on close to refresh the event edit's feed check list. Both "+ Add check" and "Edit" buttons rewired. |
| b20260403.1153 | HTML | Feature: After closing a sub-paddock, dialog shows "Open a new sub-paddock?" prompt with Yes/No. If Yes, launches sub-move sheet with close date/time pre-populated as the new move-in date. If No, closes and returns. `_cspOfferNewSubPaddock()` renders the prompt; `_cspOpenNewSub()` opens sub-move sheet with pre-filled dates. |
| b20260403.1138 | HTML | Cleanup: Removed `addEventListener('click', _cspSave)` fallback from `openCloseSubPaddockSheet`. With `bumpSetupUpdatedAt` defined and try/catch in place, the fallback caused `_cspSave` to fire twice per click (both onclick and addEventListener fire on the same event). Retained: z-index:210, type="button", try/catch — all safe. |
| b20260403.1118 | HTML | Bug fix: K-5 paddock chips section — `renderEePaddockChips()` now filters non-anchor paddock windows that have any sub-move record. |
| b20260403.1118 | HTML | Bug fix: Sub-move history ordering — open first, then closed chronologically ascending. |
| b20260403.1118 | HTML | Bug fix: Head/weight fields in event edit now read-only and derived from active groups via `getGroupTotals()`. |
| b20260403.1118 | HTML | Bug fix: Sub-move sheet `#sm-sheet-wrap` elevated to z-index:210. |
| b20260403.1136 | HTML | Bug fix: `bumpSetupUpdatedAt` ReferenceError — function was called in `_cspSave` and `saveEePaddockClose` but never defined. This was the **real cause** of the sub-paddock close button not responding (function crashed at `bumpSetupUpdatedAt()` before reaching `closeCloseSubPaddockSheet()`). Error log confirmed: `ReferenceError: Can't find variable: bumpSetupUpdatedAt` at `_cspSave`. Function now defined: queues pasture writes with updated recovery days. |
| b20260403.1136 | HTML | Bug fix: Feed entry duplication — assembly path (`loadFromSupabase`) was grouping `event_feed_deliveries` rows by DATE. When a feed entry was deleted locally (rows orphaned in Supabase) and a new entry created with the same date, orphan rows merged with new rows producing duplicate lines. Fix: assembly now groups by entry ID (`Math.floor(d.id / 1000)`) instead of date. Applied to both anchor and sub-move feed entries. |
| b20260403.1038 | HTML | Bug fix: Closed sub-move paddock (K-5) still showing as "Active" in event edit — `renderEeActivePaddocks()` filter changed from `activeSms` (active sub-moves only) to ALL sub-moves (`ev.subMoves`). Paddock windows whose `pastureName` matches ANY sub-move (active or closed) are now filtered from the active paddock cards. Anchor paddock always renders. |
| b20260403.1038 | HTML | Bug fix: Feed entries deleted on edit/save — `editEeFeedEntry()` spliced the entry from `ev.feedEntries` to prevent duplicate display but never restored it on cancel or main save. Fix: (1) `_eeEditingEntryBackup` stores deep copy before splice. (2) `closeEeFeedEntry()` restores entry + re-decrements inventory on cancel. (3) `saveEventEdit()` restores in-progress edit before saving if `_eeEditingEntryBackup` is set. (4) `saveEeFeedEntry()` clears backup on successful save. |
| b20260403.1023 | HTML | Feature: Feed check form now includes date + time pickers (default today/now). Allows backdating checks or recording exact time. `_fcSave()` reads `#fc-date` and `#fc-time` from form. Last check display in per-feed-type cards shows time when available. |
| b20260403.1023 | HTML | Feature: Feed check Supabase write now includes `check_time` (text) and `type_checks_json` (JSONB stringified) columns. Assembly layer parses `checkTime` → `.time` alias and `typeChecksJson` → parsed `.typeChecks` array. Per-type feed check data now round-trips through Supabase. |
| b20260403.1023 | SQL | **Pre-deploy migration required:** `ALTER TABLE event_feed_residual_checks ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS check_time text; ALTER TABLE event_feed_residual_checks ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS type_checks_json jsonb;` — run in Supabase SQL Editor before deploying HTML. |
| b20260403.1018 | HTML | Bug fix: "undefined" group names in event edit — `initEeGroups()` now resolves missing `groupName` from actual group record via `getGroupById()`. `renderEeGroupChips()` also has render-time fallback: `g.groupName||getGroupById(g.groupId)?.name||'Unknown'`. Root cause: groups added to events via manual flow didn't populate `groupName` on the membership record. |
| b20260403.1018 | HTML | Feature: Group picker sheet (`#add-grp-ev-wrap`) — launched from "+ Add group" on home event card (replaces `openEventEdit`). Shows all animal groups with status: "Already here" (disabled), "At [location]" (Move here button, warns if last group closes source event), "Not placed" (Add button). `openAddGroupToEventSheet(evId)`, `_ageAddGroup(groupId)`, `closeAddGroupToEventSheet()`. On add: removes group from source event (closes if last group), adds membership to target event with `groupName` populated, queues both events for Supabase write. z-index:210 for overlay-on-overlay. |
| b20260403.1008 | HTML | Bug fix: Close sub-paddock button not responding — triple fix: (1) CSS `z-index:210` for `#move-wiz-wrap`, `#close-sub-paddock-wrap`, `#feed-check-wrap` so they render above `#event-edit-wrap` (z-index:200) — eliminates iOS touch event interception by the underlying scrollable event edit sheet. (2) `addEventListener('click', _cspSave, {once:true})` attached via setTimeout(50ms) after innerHTML render as fallback for inline onclick. (3) `_cspSave` wrapped in try/catch with `closeCloseSubPaddockSheet()` guaranteed to execute outside the try block. |
| b20260403.0958 | HTML | Bug fix: "Destination paddock not found" in move wizard — `_mwPickPaddock` onclick now quotes pasture ID (`'${p.id}'` not `${p.id}`) to preserve string type. All `_mwDestPaddockId` lookups use `String()` coercion: `String(p.id)===String(_mwDestPaddockId)`. Root cause: pasture IDs are strings ("34") but unquoted template interpolation coerced to number 34; strict equality then failed. |
| b20260403.0958 | HTML | Bug fix: Close sub-paddock save button — added `type="button"` to save button, cancel button, and all 4 quality selector buttons inside `#csp-content` to prevent iOS form-submission interference in dynamically rendered innerHTML content. |
| b20260403.0958 | HTML | Feature: TO tile on move wizard step 3 now clickable — tap opens paddock/event picker (step 2) to change destination. Pencil icon (✎) added next to "TO" label. New `_mwChangeDest()` function sets `_mwStep=2` and re-renders. |
| b20260403.0934 | HTML | Bug fix: Sub-paddock close from event edit form now launches new `openCloseSubPaddockSheet()` instead of old inline `openSmCloseForm()`. Both call sites rewired: sub-move sheet "Record return" button and event edit active sub-move "Close paddock" button. |
| b20260403.0934 | HTML | Bug fix: Sub-paddock close dialog (`_cspSave`) now uses `String()` coercion for event/sub-move ID matching. Previously `e.id===_cspEvId` failed on type mismatch (number vs string), causing function to bail before reaching `closeCloseSubPaddockSheet()`. Dialog now closes on all bail-out paths. |
| b20260403.0934 | HTML | Bug fix: Feed disposition in move wizard step 3 now refreshes live when inline feed check values change. `_fcUpdateUI()` detects `_mwStep===3` and updates the `#mw-feed-disposition` container. Disposition card rendering extracted to `_mwRenderDispositionCards()` — shared by initial render and live updates. `_mwSetDisposition()` uses targeted DOM update instead of full step re-render. |
| b20260403.0934 | HTML | Bug fix: "Move group" button in event edit form now closes the editor and launches `openMoveWizSheet()` instead of the old inline destination picker flow (`startMoveGroup` rewritten). |
| b20260403.0934 | HTML | Bug fix: K-5 duplicate in event edit — `renderEeActivePaddocks()` now filters out paddock windows whose `pastureName` matches an active sub-move's `locationName`. Sub-move card is the user-facing representation; paddock window exists for NPK tracking only. Anchor paddock (idx 0) always renders. |
| b20260403.0054 | HTML | Feature: `getDailyStoredDMI(ev, dateStr)` — interpolation utility for per-day stored feed DMI. Builds a timeline from delivery dates (100%) and feedResidualChecks, linearly interpolates consumption between checkpoints, carries forward last known rate after the most recent check. Returns `{storedDMI, hasCheck}` for any date. |
| b20260403.0054 | HTML | Refactor: `_renderDMIBars()` now uses `getDailyStoredDMI()` per bar day instead of flat event-average. Each bar reflects interpolated stored DMI for that specific date. Bars scale relative to each other (`maxTotal` normalization). `isMixed` and `todayDMI` now use per-day values. Day labels show ✓ for days with actual feed checks, (est.) for interpolated days. |
| b20260403.0047 | HTML | Bug fix: 21 broken `\U0001fXXX` Python unicode escapes replaced with actual emoji characters (🌿🏚🆕📍) across renderLocationCard, renderFieldHome, move wizard (all 3 steps), paddock picker, event picker, step 3 confirm. Root cause: Python raw strings (`r'''`) don't interpret `\U` escapes — literal text was inserted into JS where `\U` is not a valid escape. |
| b20260403.0047 | HTML | Feature: Inline feed check in move wizard step 3 — when last group leaving + stored feed present, renders per-feed-type stepper+slider cards (reusing `_fcTypeData` and `_fcAdj`/`_fcUnitsChanged`/`_fcSliderChanged` from standalone feed check). `_mwRenderInlineFeedCheck()` builds the cards + disposition section. |
| b20260403.0047 | HTML | Feature: Feed disposition at close — per-feed-type "move feed?" prompt with "Record as residual" / "Move to destination" buttons. State: `_mwFeedDisposition{}`. On save: saves close-reading feed check to source event; transfers remaining feed as new feedEntry on destination event when disposition is 'move'. `_mwSetDisposition()` handler. |
| b20260403.0038 | HTML | Feature (OI-0159): `openFeedCheckSheet()` — full implementation replacing stub. Per-feed-type dual-input cards: stepper (−/+/direct, 2 decimal places) + percentage display + horizontal slider (0-100%), all three bidirectionally linked. "Consumed since last check" amber summary with units + estimated DMI lbs. Groups feed entries by feedTypeId via batch lookup. | b20260401.1011 | HTML | OI-0137 — PWA manifest encoding bug fix. `<link rel="manifest">` data URI had unescaped `"` characters in the JSON body, causing the HTML parser to truncate the `href` at the first inner quote. Browser received `data:application/manifest+json,{` — an invalid URI. All three PWA shortcuts (Field Home / Log Feed / Log Harvest) were non-functional since first added. Fix: all `"` in the JSON body replaced with `%22`. Also fixed: viewport meta tag missing `/>` (line 6); `<link rel="apple-touch-icon">` added (same SVG data URI as manifest icon) for correct iOS home screen icon. Re-install required on all devices. |

| b20260401.0946 | HTML | iOS wake / JWT-refresh resilience. (1) `_sbHasLoadedOnce` + `_sbLastLoadAt` module vars added. Auth handler skips load chain on SIGNED_IN if a successful load occurred within the last 10 min — eliminates redundant full reloads on every JWT refresh. Both flags reset on SIGNED_OUT. (2) Pre-flight probe loop added to top of `loadFromSupabase()` try block: single `.select('id').limit(1)` on `pastures`, retried up to 3× with 1.5s backoff. Absorbs "TypeError: Load failed" cascade when iOS wakes the PWA before the network stack is ready. All 3 probes failing → clean bail with sync-error status, zero cascade log entries. Supabase-level errors (have `.code`) pass straight through. |
| b20260401.0946 | ARCHITECTURE | Load guard section updated: `_sbLoadInProgress` JWT frequency corrected (~5 min). New entries for `_sbHasLoadedOnce`/`_sbLastLoadAt` JWT-refresh skip guard and iOS wake pre-flight probe. |

Renamed the single "Sub-move" entry to "Pasture sub-move". Previously, tan sub-move blocks had no matching legend swatch when no main events were stored-feed or confinement. Block colour logic unchanged — `c.win.smNoPasture` was already correct. |

Session Queue updated. Full implementation spec in SESSION_BRIEF_harvest_tile_flow.md. |
| b20260331.1359 | HTML | Bug fix: multi-user device edge case — if user A signs out and user B signs in on the same device, the cached gthy-operation-id from user A's session would be stamped onto user B's queued writes during the reconnect window. Fix: on SIGNED_IN/INITIAL_SESSION, compare the incoming Supabase user.id against the cached gthy-identity.id. If they differ (user switch), clear _sbOperationId and remove gthy-operation-id from localStorage before proceeding. User B's sbGetOperationId() call then fetches the correct operation ID from Supabase fresh. Same-user token refreshes are unaffected — the IDs match and the cache is preserved. |
| b20260331.1353 | HTML | Bug fix: null operation_id root cause — SIGNED_OUT handler was clearing localStorage["gthy-operation-id"], leaving returning users with no cached ID during the reconnect window after a token expiry. Since the operation ID is not session-sensitive (a returning user always gets the same UUID), it should never be cleared from localStorage. Fix: (1) SIGNED_OUT no longer removes gthy-operation-id from localStorage — only clears the in-memory _sbOperationId. (2) queueWrite() now reads localStorage as fallback when _sbOperationId is null in memory, so writes during reconnect always get a valid operation_id rather than null. Supersedes the flush-time patch in b20260331.1257 which remains as a backstop. |
| b20260331.1257 | HTML | Bug fix: feedback and other items written during reconnect silently dropped. Root cause: queueWrite() stores records with operation_id=null when _sbOperationId is not yet resolved (sign-in in progress). ensureQueueFlushed() was filtering out these null-operation_id items and dropping them — data loss. Fix: instead of filtering/dropping, the flush now patches null operation_id values with the now-resolved _sbOperationId before flushing. The item is saved rather than lost. |
| b20260331.1137 | HTML | Bug fix: forage types duplicating on every failed load. Same root cause as farm duplicates — migrateForageTypes() only guarded on S.forageTypes.length>0, which was always 0 when the load cascade failed. Each failed load re-seeded 7 forage type rows with new timestamp IDs. Fix: (1) switched forage_types from _sbFetch to inline fetch so errors are detectable, (2) added _sbForageTypesFetchOk flag (same pattern as _sbFarmsFetchOk), (3) migrateForageTypes() now returns immediately when fetch failed and S.forageTypes is empty — prevents seeding when emptiness is due to a network/RLS failure rather than a genuinely empty table. |
| b20260331.1129 | HTML | Bug fix: sync queue refills with farm entry after every clear. Root cause: migrateHomeFarm pasture-derivation path unconditionally re-queued the farm write whenever S.farms came back empty from Supabase — even when _sbFarmsFetchOk=true, meaning the farm already exists in Supabase (pastures FK-reference it). Fix: only re-queue the farm write when _sbFarmsFetchOk=false (fetch failed, so we cannot confirm Supabase has it). When the farms SELECT succeeds but returns empty, the farm is confirmed to exist via the pasture FK relationship — no write needed. |
| b20260331.0304 | HTML | Bug fix: operations 400 — column name mismatch. The actual column is `herd_name` but the app was selecting `name`, assembling from `op.name`, and bootstrapping with `name:`. All three corrected to `herd_name`. This was the root cause of the cascade: every load attempt hit a 42703 column-not-found error on operations, which caused the Supabase client to abort the entire request batch, making all other table fetches fail simultaneously. |
| b20260331.0250 | HTML | Bug fix: "Can't find variable: pFarm" crash in migrateHomeFarm(). The migrateHomeFarm rewrite removed the `const pFarm = ...` declaration from the forEach loop body but left the `if(pFarm !== defaultFarmId)` reference. Fix: restored `const pFarm = p.farmId ? String(p.farmId) : null` inside the forEach. |
| b20260331.0245 | HTML | Bug fix: operations 400 error persisting. Root cause: PostgREST treats `id` as a reserved parameter name — `.eq("id", operationId)` was generating `?id=eq.{uuid}` which PostgREST interpreted as a special parameter rather than a column filter, resulting in a 400. Fix: changed to `.filter("id", "eq", operationId)` which generates the unambiguous `?id=eq.{uuid}` column filter syntax that PostgREST cannot misinterpret. |
| b20260331.0225 | HTML | Bug fix: migrateHomeFarm() creating new farm every load even when Supabase returns empty farms due to missing INSERT RLS policy. New Guard 2: when farms fetch succeeds (fetchOk=true) but returns empty, check if all pastures share a common farmId — if they do, that IS the canonical farm. Reconstruct it into S.farms from the queue or localStorage and re-queue the write rather than creating a new duplicate ID. Falls back to queue-check then create-new only when pastures have no consistent farmId at all. |
| b20260331.0225 | SQL | farms table missing INSERT RLS policy — farms writes from authenticated users were silently blocked. Fix: CREATE POLICY farms_insert FOR INSERT WITH CHECK (operation_id = get_my_operation_id()). Also directly inserted canonical farm row (1774923317110) via SQL and updated all pastures to reference it. |
| b20260331.0201 | HTML | Bug fix: sbGetOperationId() triggering sbBootstrapOperation() on Supabase 4xx errors, creating duplicate operation rows. Root cause: when maybeSingle() returned data=null (either genuinely no row, or a 4xx response like 400 from missing columns), the function fell through to bootstrap unconditionally. Fix: (1) On error response from Supabase, log it and return the cached _sbOperationId rather than null — never bootstrap on an error. (2) On null data but no error, check for a cached _sbOperationId first — only bootstrap when there is genuinely no cached ID at all (true first sign-in). (3) Catch block now also returns cached ID instead of null. Prevents duplicate operations from being created on schema errors or transient failures. |
| b20260331.0201 | SQL | Root cause of all 400 errors: operations table was missing herd_type, herd_count, herd_weight, herd_dmi columns — never added during initial schema setup. Every loadFromSupabase herd fetch returned 400, causing cascading "TypeError: Load failed" across all tables (Supabase token invalidated on first 400 in some SDK versions). Also missing: SELECT policy on operations (members could not read their own operation row), UPDATE policy for saveSettings. All three fixed via SQL: ALTER TABLE operations ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS (4 columns); CREATE POLICY members_can_read_operation; CREATE POLICY owner_can_update_operation. |
| b20260331.0150 | HTML | Bug fix: realtime callback causing duplicate Home Farm creation feedback loop. Root cause: `subscribeRealtime` registered each table change to immediately call `loadFromSupabase` — no guard and no debounce. When the queue flushed a farm+pasture write to Supabase, it triggered 35 realtime events (one per pasture row), each firing a full reload. Each reload saw an empty farms table (the farm write and load were racing) and created another new farm. Fix: (1) Realtime callback now debounced — all changes within a 2s window collapse into a single reload triggered 2s after the last event. (2) Realtime callback respects `_sbLoadInProgress` — if a load is already running, the realtime-triggered reload is skipped entirely. Both fixes prevent the flush→realtime→reload→new-farm feedback loop. |
| b20260331.0150 | HTML | Diagnosis: the rapid auth events (4 SIGNED_IN pairs in 30 seconds) were caused by the realtime subscription itself. Each `subscribeRealtime` call creates a new Postgres channel; Supabase auth verifies the JWT for each channel subscription, firing additional SIGNED_IN events. The _sbLoadInProgress guard in the auth handler prevented most concurrent loads, but the unguarded realtime callback was the bypass that caused ongoing instability. |
| b20260331.0143 | HTML | Bug fix: Supabase token refresh triggering duplicate Home Farm creation. Root cause: Supabase SDK fires SIGNED_IN on every JWT token refresh (~hourly), not just genuine sign-ins. The auth handler treated every token refresh as a full reload; if the network briefly hiccupped during the refresh, all table fetches failed simultaneously and migrateHomeFarm() created another duplicate farm. Three fixes: (1) `_sbLoadInProgress` flag — if a loadFromSupabase is already running, subsequent auth events are ignored; token refresh during an active load no longer triggers a second concurrent load. (2) Farms fetched via inline `_sbClient` call instead of `_sbFetch` so we can distinguish network failure from a genuinely empty table; `_sbFarmsFetchOk` flag is only set true when the request succeeds. (3) `migrateHomeFarm()` now returns immediately if `_sbFarmsFetchOk` is false and `S.farms` is empty — network failure no longer looks like "no farms exist". Flag resets on sign-out. |
| b20260331.0143 | HTML | Fix: sync indicator flakiness explained — Supabase fires SIGNED_IN on token refresh, causing "Reconnecting…" flash and a full data reload every ~hour. `_sbLoadInProgress` guard prevents the concurrent reload that was triggering the flaky state transitions. |
| b20260331.0130 | HTML | Bug fix: migrateHomeFarm() creating duplicate Home Farm entries. Two root causes: (1) When Supabase farms fetch returned empty (table empty or network failure), the function always created a new Home Farm — even if one was already pending in the sync queue from a previous run. Fix: before creating, check the sync queue for an existing farms write matching the current operation_id; if found, reconstruct that farm into S.farms and use its ID as canonical. (2) Only pastures with no farmId were assigned the new farm — pastures still pointing to a stale ID from a previous migrateHomeFarm run were left as-is, causing FK violations when Supabase flushed pastures referencing a farm that didn't exist. Fix: now reassigns ALL pastures to the canonical farm ID unconditionally, so stale references are always corrected. |
| b20260331.0121 | HTML | Bug fix (OI new): Fields screen showing duplicate farm groups — E1 and other pastures split into two "Home Farm" sections. Root cause: `migrateHomeFarm()` ran on every page load when the Supabase farms fetch failed (TypeError: Load failed), creating a new Home Farm with a new timestamp ID each time. Pastures with stale/unrecognised farmIds were bucketed into phantom groups. Fix: `byFarm` grouping now normalises unknown farmIds to `defaultFarmId` (first known farm) using `knownFarmIds` Set — any pasture whose farmId isn't in `S.farms[]` folds into the first farm instead of creating a separate group. |
| b20260331.0121 | HTML | Enhancement: Farm filter chips added to Fields screen. When multiple farms exist, a second chip row appears (amber theme to distinguish from land-use chips): "All farms" + one chip per farm. `window._fieldFarmFilter` state var. Filter applied to `filteredPastures` before sort/group. Land use and farm filters compose independently. |
| b20260331.0114 | HTML | Bug fix: farms.id uuid type mismatch — `farms` table was created with `id uuid` but app generates timestamp string IDs (e.g. "1774919371540"). Supabase rejected all farm + pasture writes with "invalid input syntax for type uuid". Fix: SQL alters `farms.id` and `pastures.farm_id` from uuid → text (see below — run before deploying). Queue had 37 stuck items (35 pastures + 2 farms) — clear queue after running SQL. |
| b20260331.0114 | HTML | Fix: Harvest button now visible to all users (not just admins). `openHarvestSheet()` isAdmin() gate removed — recording a harvest is a member-level day-to-day operation. |
| b20260331.0106 | HTML | Bug fix: Farm users card (and all isAdmin() gates) showed member-level UI after page reload. Root cause: `sbGetOperationId()` short-circuited on the first line (`if(_sbOperationId) return`) when the operation ID was cached in localStorage, so `_sbProfile` was never fetched and stayed `null`. `isAdmin()` returns false when `_sbProfile` is null and a session exists. Fix: short-circuit only when both `_sbOperationId` AND `_sbProfile` are set; otherwise always fetch the `operation_members` row to populate `_sbProfile`. |

 SQL script updated — drops FK constraint `paddock_observations_pasture_id_fkey` before ALTER (previous v2 was blocked by FK from pasture_id to pastures.id bigint). All steps use IF EXISTS — safe to re-run. FK not recreated. Discovery: pastures.id is also bigint in Supabase — all pasture writes have been failing silently (OI-0116 logged). |

 for `paddock_observations.pasture_id` bigint→text type change. Original one-liner failed: `paddock_current_condition` view depends on `pasture_id` — PostgreSQL blocks ALTER on columns used by views. Fix: DROP VIEW, ALTER COLUMN, recreate VIEW identically. Deploy sequence: clear queue on phone → run SQL → deploy b20260330.2039. Note: b20260330.2005 was never deployed (SQL error discovered before release). |

 `_writePaddockObservation` changed from append-only to upsert — on re-save of same source/sourceId/pastureId, existing row updated in place with stable ID preserved, preventing queue deduplication bypass and accumulation of duplicate rows. SQL fix still required (ALTER TABLE paddock_observations ALTER COLUMN pasture_id TYPE text) and queue must be cleared on phone before deploying. |

 `flushToSupabase` silently discarded queue items with null `operation_id` — records queued before `sbGetOperationId` resolved were permanently lost with no trace. Added `logError` warning so the event now appears in the error log. Full requeue-on-resolve solution deferred to future session. |
| b20260330.1952 | OPEN_ITEMS | OI-0112 logged (debt — null opId silent strip). Debt count updated to 6. |

 Adding multiple animals to a group produced only 1 membership row in Supabase. `_openGroupMembership` used `id: Date.now()` — synchronous forEach loop assigns the same ms timestamp to all 10 rows; `queueWrite` deduplication by `id` collapses them to 1 entry. Fixed: `id: Date.now() + S.animalGroupMemberships.length` — array length increments each iteration, guaranteeing unique IDs. |
| b20260330.1939 | OPEN_ITEMS | OI-0111 closed. Status counts updated. |

 Offline data entered on mobile was lost on reconnect. `onAuthStateChange` only flushed the pending write queue on `SIGNED_IN`, not `INITIAL_SESSION`. On a normal PWA resume (still-valid session token), the event is always `INITIAL_SESSION` — `loadFromSupabase` ran immediately with no flush, overwriting `S.*` before local changes reached Supabase. Fixed: added `ensureQueueFlushed()` helper (flushes queue if online and authenticated); collapsed the `SIGNED_IN`/`INITIAL_SESSION` if/else — both now `await ensureQueueFlushed()` before `loadFromSupabase`. Realtime callback also updated to pre-flush. Confirmed against error log entry [4] at 18:51:48. |
| b20260330.1903 | HTML | Bug fix (OI-0110): New animal group creation caused FK violations on `animal_group_memberships`. `_openGroupMembership()` (which queues membership rows) was called before `queueWrite('animal_groups', ...)` queued the parent group record. On flush, Supabase rejected membership rows with `animal_group_memberships_group_id_fkey` because the parent didn't exist yet. Fixed: group record queued first, then `animalIds.forEach` loop in the new-group branch of `saveGroupFromSheet()`. Confirmed against error log entries [1] and [2] at 18:54:39. |
| b20260330.1903 | OPEN_ITEMS | OI-0109 and OI-0110 closed. Status counts updated. |
| b20260330.1903 | ARCHITECTURE | `ensureQueueFlushed` added to M3 write-path function list. Build stamp updated. |

 `_animalRow()` shape function missing `confirmed_bred` and `confirmed_bred_date` columns. Any animal marked confirmed-bred in the app never had that flag reach Supabase — data was written to localStorage only, overwritten on next `loadFromSupabase`. Fixed: both fields added to `_animalRow` and to `_SB_ALLOWED_COLS['animals']`. |
| b20260330.1056 | HTML | Bug fix (OI-0107): `_batchRow()` shape function missing `wt` (unit weight) and `archived` columns. Batch unit-weight edits and archiving actions never persisted to Supabase. Fixed: both fields added to `_batchRow` and to `_SB_ALLOWED_COLS['batches']`. Requires `supabase-schema-fixes.sql` to be run first to add the two columns to the live table. |
| b20260330.1056 | HTML | Bug fix (OI-0108): `_feedTypeRow()` shape function missing `cost_per_unit` column. Column exists in schema DDL and is returned by `loadFromSupabase`, but was never written on update. Fixed: added to `_feedTypeRow` and `_SB_ALLOWED_COLS['feed_types']`. |
| b20260330.1056 | HTML | Correctness: `_SB_ALLOWED_COLS` updated for all three tables above. Without this second fix, the shape function additions would be silently stripped by `_sanitizeQueueRecord` at flush time — the allowlist is the final gate before every Supabase upsert. |

| b20260330.0020 | HTML | M6-B: `_sbProfile` module var added (`let _sbProfile = null`). `sbGetOperationId()` select expanded to `operation_id, role, display_name, field_mode` — populates `_sbProfile` on sign-in. `_sbProfile` cleared to null on `SIGNED_OUT`. `getActiveUser()` updated to prefer `_sbProfile.role` and `_sbProfile.display_name` over localStorage cache when signed in. |
| b20260330.0020 | HTML | M6-B: `isAdmin()` helper added. Returns `true` if `_sbProfile.role === 'owner'` or `'admin'`. Falls back to `true` when no Supabase session (offline / single-user mode — no regression). Used as gate before all privileged actions. |
| b20260330.0020 | HTML | M6-C: `sbInviteMember(email, role)` added. Inserts pending `operation_members` row (`user_id` null, `invited_at` set) then calls `supabase.auth.signInWithOtp` to send OTP to invitee. Does not affect admin session. Admin-only gate via `isAdmin()`. |
| b20260330.0020 | HTML | M6-C: `sbPostSignInCheck(user)` added. Called from `sbVerifyOtp()` on successful OTP verification. Calls `claim_pending_invite` RPC (SECURITY DEFINER) to claim any pending invite for this email, then loads `operation_members` row, sets `_sbProfile` + `_sbOperationId`, and calls `loadFromSupabase` + `subscribeRealtime`. Handles both existing-user and new-invitee sign-in paths. |
| b20260330.0020 | HTML | M6-D: `renderOperationMembersList()` added. Async — queries `operation_members` for current operation, renders accepted members (display name + role badge + Remove button for non-owner/non-self when admin) and pending rows (email + ⏳ badge + Cancel button). Invite form (`#member-invite-form`) shown/hidden based on `isAdmin()`. `sbRemoveMember(id)` and `sbCancelInvite(id)` added as helpers. Wired into settings render path. |
| b20260330.0020 | HTML | M6-E: Farm users card HTML replaced. Old card (local S.users[] form with name/role/email/color-picker inputs) replaced with `#members-list` + `#member-invite-form` (email + role select + Send invite button). Legacy `#users-list` retained as hidden stub to prevent stale call-site errors. |
| b20260330.0020 | HTML | M6-F: `isAdmin()` gates added to all privileged destructive actions: `deleteAnimal()`, `tryDeletePasture()`, `tryDeleteFeedType()`, `executeReset()`, `importDataJSON()`. Each returns early with an alert if `!isAdmin()`. |
| b20260330.0020 | HTML | M6-G: Legacy `S.users[]` system retired. `addUser()` replaced with redirect to Settings. `renderUsersList()` stubbed (no-op — `#users-list` hidden). `openUserPicker()` redirects to Settings (Supabase identity world has no local picker). `S.users[]` retained as empty compat shim for todo assignment system (full todo migration is a future task). Home todos filter and `createdBy` stamp updated to prefer `_sbSession.user.id`. Dev brief users count noted as legacy. |
| b20260329.2336 | HTML | Enhancement (OI-0021): Event AUD recalc on animal move/cull. New `_memberWeightedDays(ae, outDate)` helper computes total animal-days for an event by summing each membership row's overlap with the event window `[ae.dateIn, outDate]`. `dateJoined null` treated as present from event start (pre-migration members). `dateLeft` clamped to event end if after outDate. Fallback to `ae.head × days` when: no membership rows for the group; or multi-group event (OI-0105 — future enhancement). Both `calcEventTotalsWithSubMoves` (close path) and `recalcEventTotals` (edit-a-closed-event path) now use `effectiveAUD` instead of `head × days` for NPK calculation. `const st = S.settings` moved before the NPK block in `calcEventTotalsWithSubMoves`; `bw` variable removed from `recalcEventTotals` (was only used in the NPK block). Zero regression: all events without membership data continue to compute NPK identically to before. |
| b20260329.2336 | OPEN_ITEMS | OI-0021 closed. OI-0105 added: membership-weighted NPK for multi-group events (deferred). |
